name: eo-microsaas-dev
description: EO MicroSaaS Dev plugin for non-technical founders — weekend-ship MVP. Linear build chain 1-8 (/1-eo-dev-start → /2-eo-dev-plan → /3-eo-code → /4-eo-review → /5-eo-score → /6-eo-bridge-gaps → /7-eo-ship → /8-eo-retro) — 8 numbered steps, in order across the weekend. 7 utilities un-numbered, alphabetical (/eo-debug, /eo-dev-repair, /eo-freeze, /eo-github, /eo-guide, /eo-status, /eo-unfreeze) — fire out-of-band, not in linear sequence. 11 skills underneath. One-shot bootstrap via /1-eo-dev-start (reads EO-Brain phases 0-4, asks SaaSfast yes/no, picks mode M0-M3 if yes, plan-mode gated). GitHub admin via /eo-github (create / point-existing / guided / audit; MCP-only with manual fallback; plan-aware; trunk-vs-dual branch strategy; branch protection deferred to post-first-CI). Surgical repair via /eo-dev-repair. Systematic debug via /eo-debug. 5-hat scoring with 90+ ship gate. Self-scoring on ship + repair + debug. Cross-session resumability via /eo-guide. CEO-voice founder-facing artifacts. MENA-specific checks (Arabic RTL, mobile 375px). BRD traceability from EO-Brain Phase 5. Every refuse path names a concrete next door.
